chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc: Application No.S-19 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.02.2026 Mr. Heman Das, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, A.P.G a/w SIP Sher Muhammad PS Kunri. = Mr. Ghulam Rasool Soomro advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.3, which is taken on record. In compliance of last order, the respondent Nos.2&3 have produced detainees before this Court, however, counsel for the respondent states that the applicant had also filed application under section 491 Cr.P.C before Sessions Judge, Umerkot and same was dismissed and produced copy of such order. The detainee namely Radha @ Meeran verbally states before this Court that after embracing the Islam, she being sui-juris lady contracted marriage with respondent No.3 namely Punhoon with her own will and wish and she wants to reside with her husband Punhoon along with her minor child(detainee No.2 Harchand), who is in her custody. In view of above terms, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is hereby dismissed. JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
